title: Real Decreto-ley 14/2022
summary: Public and commercial buildings may not cool below 27°C in summer
source_name: BOE – Real Decreto-ley 14/2022 de 1 de agosto

title: Decreto-Legge 1 marzo 2022 n.17 (Decreto Bollette) conv. Legge 27 aprile 2022 n.34
summary: Public buildings (schools, offices, post offices) must not cool below 25°C in summer (27°C target with −2°C tolerance); hospitals, clinics and care facilities excluded

title: Regulation (EU) 2024/573 on fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-gas Regulation)
summary: Phases down HFCs used in AC and heat pumps; bans new residential AC with refrigerant GWP ≥ 150 from 2027 and split systems ≥ 12 kW with high-GWP refrigerants from 2033
source_name: EUR-Lex – Official Journal of the European Union

title: Directive (EU) 2024/1275 – Energy Performance of Buildings Directive (EPBD recast)
summary: Requires member states to set minimum energy performance standards for technical building systems including cooling; mandates inspection of AC systems and priority for passive cooling strategies
source_name: EUR-Lex – Official Journal of the European Union
